commands.review_summary:
The PR adds package `dist` content inventory metadata, captures local packaged `dist` edits before staged package swaps, reapplies non-conflicting local overrides, reports override status in `openclaw update`, and documents the recovery behavior.

PR surface: Source +647, Tests +624, Docs +7, Other +31. Total +1309 across 13 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the changed behavior from source and PR proof: current package updates swap verified package contents, while this PR captures and reapplies selected local `dist` edits. I did not run the live update smoke locally because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can align the release script with the runtime symlink check and add the missing test; maintainers still own the final default-reapply trust decision.

target.title: fix(update): preserve local package overrides
target.body:
## Summary

- Add package `dist` content inventory metadata so package-manager updates can identify modified, deleted, and dependency-linked added local files by content hash.
- Capture local packaged `dist` overrides before a staged package swap, validate the new package inventory before activation, and reapply only safe per-file changes while preserving conflicts in a recovery bundle.
- Keep postinstall/release candidate package metadata aligned, surface local override status in `openclaw update`, and document the recovery behavior.

Behavioral proof: live Crabbox smoke passed on Blacksmith Testbox for both successful reapply and upstream conflict preservation:

- Happy path: `provider=blacksmith-testbox`, run `tbx_01kt79k1y53x9yfg7hw64dnc56` (`amber-prawn`), Actions run https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/26902674696.
- Conflict path: `provider=blacksmith-testbox`, run `tbx_01kt7a4dxn54akkm66cbqp16f7` (`quick-crayfish`), Actions run https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/26903180441.

## Verification

- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 scripts/postinstall-bundled-plugins.mjs scripts/openclaw-cross-os-release-checks.ts test/scripts/postinstall-bundled-plugins.test.ts test/scripts/openclaw-cross-os-release-checks.test.ts src/infra/package-dist-inventory.ts src/infra/package-local-overrides.ts src/infra/package-update-steps.ts src/infra/update-runner.ts src/cli/update-cli/progress.ts src/cli/update-cli/update-command.ts src/infra/package-dist-inventory.test.ts src/infra/package-update-steps.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs test/scripts/postinstall-bundled-plugins.test.ts test/scripts/openclaw-cross-os-release-checks.test.ts src/infra/package-dist-inventory.test.ts src/infra/package-update-steps.test.ts src/infra/update-runner.test.ts src/cli/update-cli/progress.test.ts` (6 files, 214 tests)
- `git diff --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local --prompt "Review the final OpenClaw update local override preservation patch after the post-verify fallback guard fix. Confirm no accepted/actionable regressions remain in update fallback, local override conflict handling, and inventory validation."` (`autoreview clean: no accepted/actionable findings reported`)

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: package-manager `openclaw update` preserves local packaged `dist` edits when safe, and preserves but does not reapply local changes when upstream changed the same file.

Real environment tested: Crabbox delegated Blacksmith Testbox (`provider=blacksmith-testbox`).

Exact steps or command run after this patch: built candidate tarballs, installed candidate A into a temp npm global prefix, edited installed `dist/index.js`, ran `openclaw update --tag <candidate.tgz> --yes --json --no-restart`, and asserted the JSON/local filesystem state. The second run updated to a candidate B whose `dist/index.js` changed upstream.

Evidence after fix: happy-path run `tbx_01kt79k1y53x9yfg7hw64dnc56`; conflict-path run `tbx_01kt7a4dxn54akkm66cbqp16f7`.

Observed result after fix: happy path reported `localOverrides.status: applied`, `modified: 1`, `applied: 1`, and the local marker remained after update. Conflict path reported `localOverrides.status: conflict`, `modified: 1`, `applied: 0`, conflict `{ path: "dist/index.js", reason: "target-changed" }`; the upstream marker remained installed and the local marker was preserved in the recovery bundle.

What was not tested: full `pnpm check:changed`/full suite was not run for this PR branch; focused local tests and the two live Crabbox update smokes were run. The live Crabbox smokes predated the final review hardening around added dependency closure and content-inventory validation; those hardening paths are covered by focused Vitest regressions in this PR.
target.author: fuller-stack-dev
